title: Pat Clynes
compiled_truth: Pat Clynes is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-20 to 2001-05-25), Pat Clynes sent 45 and received 750 emails, totalling 795 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (45), [Gary Hanks](people/gary-hanks) (25), [Robert Lloyd](people/robert-lloyd) (21), [Lauri Allen](people/lauri-allen) (15), [Aimee Lannou](people/aimee-lannou) (14).
